scripts.static: cp -R packages/demo-reactjs/build/ build/ && cp CNAME build/CNAME

comments.resolutions: babel-plugin-istanbul@7.0.1 (pulled by jest's coverage) ships a stray 'workspaces' field, which makes yarn print 'Workspaces can only be enabled in private projects.' on every install. 7.0.0 is identical (same deps/main) but lacks that field, so we pin it here.
